authCardIntro: Use your phone number to continue into protected KYLYVNYK CLUB areas.
formError: Please review the form and try again.
onboardingDescription: Complete the member profile used inside your private dashboard.
signInNameHelp: Enter your full name as it should appear on the club card
phoneAuthCodeHelp: Enter the SMS code sent by Supabase Auth.
phoneAuthCaptchaError: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
phoneAuthRateLimitError: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
twoFactorRequiredDescription: Set up or verify your authenticator app to open admin tools.
signOutDescription: You are signing out of the private member area.
signUpCardIntro: Enter your phone number to create your KYLYVNYK CLUB membership.
signUpNameHelp: Enter your full name as it should appear on the club card
phoneAuthPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid international phone number (e.g. +380501234567).
mfaSetupDescription: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
mfaChallengeDescription: Enter the current 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfaCodeHelp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
